title: Document Control
focus: creation, approval, review, versioning, retention, and retirement of ISMS documents

title: ISMS Scope
focus: organizational, product, technology, location, people, dependency, and exclusion boundaries

title: Organization Context
focus: internal and external issues, interested parties, requirements, and climate relevance

title: Roles and Responsibilities
focus: authority, accountability, competence, segregation constraints, continuity, and independent audit

title: Security Objectives and Metrics
focus: measurable objectives, owners, measurement sources, review, and corrective action

title: Compliance Obligations
focus: legal, regulatory, contractual, privacy, intellectual-property, and records obligations

title: SOC 2 System Description
focus: services, commitments, system components, boundaries, data, people, procedures, and subservice organizations

title: Risk Management Methodology
focus: repeatable identification, scoring, evaluation, treatment, acceptance, and review rules

title: Risk Register
focus: current information-security risks, existing controls, scores, owners, and decisions

title: Risk Treatment Plan
focus: approved treatments, control owners, resources, deadlines, residual risk, and acceptance

title: Statement of Applicability
focus: all Annex A applicability decisions, justifications, implementation status, owners, and evidence

title: Information Security Policy
focus: management direction, principles, commitments, responsibilities, communication, and exceptions

title: Asset Management and Acceptable Use
focus: asset ownership, inventory, acceptable use, return, endpoint protection, and disposal

title: Identity and Access Control
focus: identity lifecycle, least privilege, privileged access, authentication, review, and service accounts

title: Data Classification, Privacy, and Retention
focus: classification, handling, privacy roles, transfers, retention, deletion, masking, and leakage prevention

title: Cryptography and Secret Management
focus: approved cryptography, transport and storage protection, keys, credentials, rotation, and compromise

title: People Security and Remote Work
focus: screening, terms, awareness, confidentiality, remote work, disciplinary action, exit, and reporting

title: Physical and Environmental Security
focus: work locations, equipment, physical access, environmental threats, media, maintenance, and disposal

title: Supplier and Cloud Security
focus: supplier selection, agreements, cloud responsibility, monitoring, changes, concentration, and exit

title: Secure Development and Change Management
focus: development lifecycle, requirements, architecture, coding, testing, environments, changes, releases, and test data

title: Operations and Network Security
focus: capacity, configuration, time, networks, service boundaries, segregation, filtering, and operational ownership

title: Vulnerability and Malware Management
focus: threat awareness, dependency and vulnerability detection, triage, remediation, malware protection, and software installation

title: Logging and Monitoring
focus: security logging, event coverage, access, integrity, monitoring, alerting, privacy, retention, and response

title: Security Incident Management
focus: preparation, reporting, assessment, response, communications, evidence, recovery, and learning

title: Business Continuity, Backup, and Recovery
focus: critical services, disruption scenarios, recovery targets, backups, redundancy, restoration, testing, and communications

title: Joiner, Mover, Leaver, and Access Review
focus: access requests, approval, provisioning, role changes, removal, asset return, and periodic review

title: Change and Release
focus: request, risk review, approval, testing, deployment, rollback, emergency changes, and records

title: Vulnerability Remediation
focus: intake, validation, severity decision, ownership, remediation, exception, verification, and closure

title: Security Incident Playbook
focus: triage, containment, investigation, preservation, notification, recovery, lessons learned, and records

title: Backup, Restore, and Continuity Test
focus: backup checks, restoration, continuity exercises, success criteria, findings, and follow-up

title: Supplier Onboarding, Review, and Exit
focus: due diligence, approval, contract and data review, access, monitoring, changes, offboarding, and deletion

title: Key and Secret Rotation
focus: inventory, planned and emergency rotation, validation, revocation, recovery, and records

title: Data Request, Deletion, and Disposal
focus: request intake, identity and authority verification, search, export, correction, deletion, backup handling, and closure

title: Asset Register
focus: information, software, infrastructure, physical, people, service, and assurance assets

title: Data and Processing Register
focus: data categories, subjects, purposes, roles, legal basis, systems, regions, transfers, retention, and deletion

title: Supplier Register
focus: service, purpose, criticality, data, regions, plan, assurance, contract, review, access, and exit

title: Privileged Access Register
focus: privileged identity, system, role, owner, approval, authentication, recovery, review, and status

title: Incident Register
focus: security events and incidents, classification, impact, response, notification, recovery, and learning

title: Vulnerability Register
focus: confirmed vulnerabilities, affected assets, severity decision, owner, treatment, due date, exception, and verification

title: Training and Competence Register
focus: role competence requirements, training, completion, assessment, evidence, and follow-up

title: Exception Register
focus: approved deviations, rationale, risk, compensating controls, owner, expiry, review, and closure

title: ISO 27001 and SOC 2 Security Control Crosswalk
focus: requirements and control identifiers linked to owner, document, implementation state, and expected evidence

title: Control Evidence Index
focus: expected evidence, external location, source, cadence, period, owner, retention, and verification

title: Internal Audit Program
focus: scope, criteria, frequency, method, competence, impartiality, reporting, and follow-up

title: Management Review Process
focus: required inputs, decisions, actions, resources, changes, improvement, and retained record

focus: nonconformity containment, cause, correction, action, ownership, effectiveness, and closure

title: Certification Readiness Checklist
focus: scope, risk, applicability, policies, controls, evidence expectations, audit program, review, and auditor validation

title: Internal Audit Report Template
focus: scope, criteria, independence, sampling, findings, conclusions, and follow-up

title: Management Review Record Template
focus: inputs, decisions, actions, resources, changes, opportunities, owners, and deadlines

title: Access Review Record Template
focus: population, reviewer, access decisions, removals, exceptions, verification, and evidence

focus: service changes, plan, assurance, incidents, access, data, risk, decisions, and follow-up

title: Backup and Restore Test Record Template
focus: system, backup, scenario, restoration, integrity, timing, result, findings, and actions
